chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 55 of 2013 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For orders on CMA No.4441/2024 (C/A) 26.08.2025 Mr. Shewak Ram Valecha, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kuber, Assistant AG Sindh Mr. Nisar Ahmed G. Abro, Deputy Attorney General Mr. Safdar Kamal Ansari, Advocate for Respondents-NADRA SIP Dhani Bux Bhutto on behalf of SSP, Sukkur. >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner has submitted the copies of the four post-dated cheques bearing No.52527721, 52527720, 52527722 and 44592846 dated 27.08.2025, 07.09.2025, 07.10.2025 and 07.11.2025 for amounting to Rs.150000/-, 150000/-, 150000 and 138582/-, respectively, issued by the Respondents in favour of the Petitioner, and submits that the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served, hence under instructions seeks disposal of listed application (CMA No.4441/2024). The original cheques have been handed over to the Petitioner in Court though acknowledgment. Accordingly, the listed application is hereby disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
